prompt: Generate a vercel.json configuration file and a .env.example file for a Next.js deployment. Write both files to the workspace.

mock_result.response:
Two configuration files written to workspace:

1. vercel.json:
{
  "buildCommand": "next build",
  "outputDirectory": ".next",
  "framework": "nextjs",
  "regions": ["iad1"]
}

2. .env.example:
NEXTAUTH_SECRET=your-secret-here
NEXTAUTH_URL=https://yourdomain.com
DATABASE_URL=postgresql://user:pass@host:5432/db

Both files persisted to /tmp/jobs/job-mock-deploy-005/
